lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: My car is making a strange noise when I brake. Can you check it?
lines.cn: 我的车刹车时会发出奇怪的声音。你能检查一下吗？

lines.speaker: Mechanic
lines.content: Sure. Let me take a look. When did you last replace the brake pads?
lines.cn: 好的。让我看看。你上次换刹车片是什么时候？

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: I think it was about two years ago. I do not drive that much.
lines.cn: 大概两年前吧。我开得不多。

lines.speaker: Mechanic
lines.content: The brake pads are worn out. You need new ones. The rotors are still okay though.
lines.cn: 刹车片磨损了。你需要换新的。不过刹车盘还凑合。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: How much will it cost to replace the brake pads?

lines.speaker: Mechanic
lines.content: It will be one hundred and twenty dollars for the parts and labor. I can do it today.
lines.cn: 零件加人工一共120美元。我今天就能换好。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: Okay, please go ahead. Also, can you change the oil and check the tires?
lines.cn: 好的，请换吧。另外，你能换机油并检查一下轮胎吗？

lines.speaker: Mechanic
lines.content: No problem. The oil change is fifty dollars, and the tire check is free. Total is one hundred and seventy dollars.
lines.cn: 没问题。换机油50美元，检查轮胎免费。总共170美元。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: That is fine. How long will it take? I can wait in the waiting area.
lines.cn: 可以。需要多久？我可以在休息区等。

lines.speaker: Mechanic
lines.content: About an hour. I will call you when it is ready. Please have a seat and enjoy some coffee.
lines.cn: 大概一小时。好了我叫你。请坐，喝杯咖啡。
